caption: In a professional indoor setting, three people are positioned on a stage in front of a white wall. On the far left, a man in a dark navy suit stands behind a small white high-top table. In the center, a woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark navy blazer and tan trousers, sits on a white stool behind a matching white table. On the right, a man in a patterned brown and black shirt and navy trousers stands behind a third white table. Each table is equipped with a microphone. To the right, a large banner displays an image of two hands and the text "INTERACTIE" and "PRAKTIJK EN ZORGVRAAG." The "mediasite" logo is visible at the top of the scene. Across the frames, the individuals remain in their respective positions, with the men occasionally shifting their posture while the woman remains seated, maintaining a steady presence as they engage in a discussion.
